name: testNavigateToReportsPage
description: User navigate to 'Reports page' after clicking on 'Reports' link on the header
descriptionHtml: User navigate to 'Reports page' after clicking on 'Reports' link on the header
statusMessage:

Received: https://test.npgw.xyz/dashboard

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
